_comment: DFM — convection + generative closure (two-part warp model). See dfm/config.py for design rationale.

model._alpha: MEASURED by scripts/calibrate_alpha.py (48 pairs): true per-step shift -0.0034 coords/frame at v_x~4.3. The old placeholder 0.01 was 11x too large — the aux loss dragged warps toward ~-0.043 (near the bound) vs true -0.0034, actively fighting recon. Re-run the calibration if solver dt / domain size / render resolution changes. y-axis fit is weakly conditioned (v_y~-0.09, tiny) — treat alpha_y as approximate.
model._pyramid: flow pyramid: warp_pyramid_levels>1 sums div-free displacement at doubling res (base=warp_map_res). Base carries mean-flow+gain; finer levels are pure flow detail, |disp| decayed, penalised more, unlocked on a curriculum.
